response.global_analysis:
1. Vocal/Music Audio Match: The video contains no vocal audio, only instrumental background music. Therefore, no lyrics or spoken vocals are transcribed.
2. Visual Events Trigger: Subtitles are generated based on the prominent on-screen text announcements (merchandise sales, concert starting notice, and visitor attention slide) for their respective durations.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings strictly correspond to the visual transitions of the primary information slides.

subtitles.original: The concert will be starting soon.
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.
